events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess flanged joints with incomplete bolt pattern. The work is rough-complete. Reference: ASME PCC-1, B16.5. Incomplete bolt pattern means not all bolts are installed. This is a defect. Flanged joints require all bolts to be properly installed and tightened per code. So it's non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? Incomplete bolt pattern could lead to leak, joint failure, so critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 90%? But incomplete bolt pattern means not fully installed, so maybe 80%? I'll estimate 80. Value: none. Confidence: high. Findings: "Flanged joint has incomplete bolt pattern; missing bolts." Actions: "Install all required bolts and torque to specification." Rationale: "ASME B16.5 requires all bolts to be installed and tightened for flanged joints. Incomplete bolt pattern is non-compliant and poses a leak risk." References: ASME B16.5, ASME PCC-1. I'll output JSON.
